subcodes.first_line: Invoke the Word bestowed by the Youth upon him who hath believed in God, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful, that he may take it with strength from Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر کلمه من لدی الغلام الی الذی آمن بالله العزیز الوهاب لیاخذها بقوه من لدنا
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
